reviews.comment:
El baño muy limpio pero cerrado con llave, el playero que me atendió, no estaba de muy buen ánimo cuando le pedí que me abra. El desayuno bueno.

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom was very clean but locked; the attendant who helped me wasn't in a very good mood when I asked him to let me in. The breakfast was good.

reviews.comment:
Trato irrespetuoso de playeros..desidia para atender a mi esposa en apertura de baños. Alguien debería explicarles que no le hacen el favor a usuarios de YPF con ese servicio. Un curso de servicio al cliente con urgencia!!!

(Translated by Google)
Disrespectful treatment from gas station attendants...negligence in assisting my wife when the restrooms opened. Someone should explain to them that they're not doing YPF customers a favor with that service. A customer service course is urgently needed!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwaW91eUhnEAE
